title: Harmonograph Studio
description: Four-pendulum mathematical art machine — tune frequencies, phase & damping to trace mesmerizing Lissajous-based curves.
concept: A digital harmonograph driven by two pairs of pendulums (X and Y axes). Each pendulum contributes a sinusoidal motion with exponential damping, producing infinitely varied spirograph-like patterns. Tune all 16 parameters in real time, pick from 8 named presets, choose 4 color modes, export PNG, save state, or share via URL hash.
features: 4 independent pendulums with frequency, phase, damping, and amplitude controls
8 named presets (Butterfly, Rosette, Helix, Star, Spiral, Web, Figure 8, Galaxy)
4 color modes: Rainbow, Velocity-map, Solid gradient, Age-fade
Speed, line-width, trail-opacity, and max-time controls
PNG export, localStorage save/load, shareable URL hash

interaction.click: preset buttons, play/pause, clear, export, share
interaction.touch: panel works touch; mobile toggle button shows/hides panel
